title: Contact | Gareth Davies MP
meta_description: Latest news and campaigns from Gareth Davies, Member of Parliament for for Grantham and Bourne.
headings: h3: Gareth Davies MP Working hard for Grantham and Bourne
text_excerpt: Contact | Gareth Davies MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Gareth News My local priorities Help & Advice Contact Leave this field blank Parliamentary Office House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA [email protected] Gareth on Facebook Gareth on Twitter Gareth on Instagram Gareth on LinkdIn First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy .
